recentNews.headline: Lucid suspends 2026 production guidance pending new-CEO review after delivering 3,093 vehicles in Q1; launches $500M cost-cut plan
recentNews.whyItMatters: Pulling guidance signals a strategic reset and raises uncertainty on the Gravity ramp and cash burn just as Napoli takes over.

recentNews.headline: Lucid names Schindler veteran Silvio Napoli as permanent CEO (effective June 1, 2026) and expands Uber deal to ~$500M / 35,000 robotaxis
recentNews.whyItMatters: Ends 14 months of interim leadership with an industrial-operations outsider and deepens the Uber/Nuro autonomy commitment that underpins Lucid's volume story.

recentNews.headline: Lucid lays off ~12% of salaried workforce to push toward profitability
recentNews.whyItMatters: Cost discipline as EV demand softens; signals the cash-burn pressure on a still-unprofitable maker.

recentNews.headline: Lucid, Uber and Nuro unveil the Gravity-based Level 4 robotaxi ahead of 2026 commercial launch
recentNews.whyItMatters: Turns the 20,000+ vehicle robotaxi partnership into tangible product, a key non-retail volume channel for the Gravity platform.

recentNews.headline: Lucid Q3 2025: revenue +68% YoY, 4,078 deliveries; cuts FY production to ~18,000 and PIF lifts term-loan facility to ~$2.0B
recentNews.whyItMatters: Growth plus a guidance cut and a bigger Saudi backstop frame the core bull/bear debate: ramp execution vs. dependence on PIF funding.

recentNews.headline: Uber inks six-year robotaxi deal with Lucid, invests $300M, targeting 20,000+ Nuro-powered vehicles
recentNews.whyItMatters: A marquee partnership with capital attached validates Lucid's tech and opens a large fleet-volume channel beyond consumer sales.

recentNews.headline: Founder-CEO Peter Rawlinson abruptly steps down; COO Marc Winterhoff named interim CEO
recentNews.whyItMatters: Loss of the company's technical founder created leadership uncertainty that overhung the stock through the entire 2025-2026 CEO search.
